title: Purple Mardo
description: PVP-focused texture pack . Various tweaks were given to create more flair and personality like swords and potions.
body:
What is this Texturepack?

Well this texturepack is for all types of pvp styles it uses custom textures for almost everything mainly the sword and potions 

Why would a user want to download it?

Well its a simple quality of life for the users who play any pvp related gameodes such as potpvp, nethpot and sword.

How to install Download Texturepack Go to %appdata% Copy .zip to /Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks
